title: Module Sell Revenue
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(SellPrice), 0) AS total FROM ModuleSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(SellItem_Localised, SellItem) AS label, COALESCE(SUM(SellPrice), 0) AS value FROM ModuleSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY SellItem ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} Cr recovered selling modules during the report period. A large sell revenue alongside a diverse module list tells the story of a significant refit — either a purposeful build overhaul or the financial aftermath of a major change in how you play.
details.help: ModuleSell SellPrice is the credit return. total drives the title as the module disposal revenue.

tagLines: Module sell transaction records compiled. Outfitting disposal revenue noted in the fleet management record.
Every module you sold was one you no longer needed. Or could no longer afford to need. Either way.
The refit revenue covers some of the new build cost. How much depends on what you were replacing.
